args.title: New SLP Referral – Emma Lee (DOB 2018-09-04) – Prior Auth Required

args.body:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for choosing Cedar Kids Therapy for Emma's care! We received the referral from Dr. Priya Nair at Northside Pediatrics and are happy to help.

We have placed a pending hold on the following evaluation appointment that matches your availability preference:

📅 Thursday, May 1, 2026 at 3:30 PM
👩‍⚕️ Provider: Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP
📋 Type: Speech-Language Evaluation

Before we can confirm this appointment, our team needs to complete a prior authorization request with Blue Cross Blue Shield on Emma's behalf. We will be in touch shortly to confirm the authorization status and finalize the booking.

In the meantime, our intake team will reach out to you to complete new patient paperwork. If you have any questions or need to reach us, please call our front desk.

We look forward to working with Emma!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Initiate prior authorization with Blue Cross Blue Shield before confirming the held slot (May 1, 2026 at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP). Intake team should complete new patient onboarding paperwork with Daniel Lee and confirm appointment once auth is approved. Task created for intake (task_01kskh72mwz6ze0d0vsfcn0yjq), due 2026-04-29.

items.decision_rationale:
**Classification:** new_referral — Fax referral from a pediatrician's office for a child not found in the patient database.

**Urgency: P2 (Standard)** — This is a routine new patient referral with no safeguarding concerns, no same-day scheduling urgency, and complete intake information. Due date set to 2026-04-29 (2 business days).

**Patient Search:** Emma Lee (DOB 2018-09-04) returned no results — confirmed new patient.

**Insurance Verification:** BCBS PPO (Member ID BCBS-884200) verified as ACTIVE IN-NETWORK with a $30 copay. No discrepancy between stated payer and verified payer. ⚠️ Prior authorization IS required — this must be initiated before the appointment can be confirmed.

**Service Line Check:** SLP for a child born 2018-09-04 (age ~7) is within the 0–18 service range. Discipline confirmed as SLP.

**Slot Selection:** Family requested after-school Tuesdays or Thursdays. Available slots were searched and slot_slp_maya_2026_05_01_1530 (Thursday, May 1 at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP) was identified as a direct match. A hold was placed (hold_01kskh72mw2a0bnjkedfa7aye4, expires 2026-05-27).

**No Escalation Required:** No safeguarding indicators, no same-day scheduling conflicts.

**Task Created:** Assigned to intake team (task_01kskh72mwz6ze0d0vsfcn0yjq), due 2026-04-29, with full context including prior auth requirement and slot hold details.

**Draft Message:** Sent to daniel.lee@example.com via email in English, acknowledging the referral, communicating the pending hold, and setting expectations around prior auth and paperwork — without providing any clinical advice.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Speech therapy evaluation request; safeguarding concern — parent disclosed father 'getting rough with him during weekends'

args.reason: Parent (Maria Gomez) disclosed during voicemail that the child Leo (age 6) has been experiencing the father "getting rough with him during weekends." This language suggests potential physical harm or unsafe caregiving by a parent figure. This is a P0 safeguarding concern requiring immediate clinical lead review and mandatory reporting assessment.

args.notes: Voicemail received 2026-04-27 at 19:43 PT from Maria Gomez (555-0102) requesting an SLP evaluation for her son Leo, age 6. During the voicemail, she disclosed: "he has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends." This language constitutes a potential disclosure of physical harm or unsafe caregiving by the father. Clinical lead must review immediately for mandatory reporting obligations. Do NOT provide investigative advice to the family. A neutral acknowledgment message has been drafted for staff review before sending. Leo does not appear in the patient database — this is a new patient inquiry.
args.title: P0 Safeguarding Review – Leo Gomez (Age 6)

args.body: Hi Maria, thank you so much for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy. We received your voicemail about Leo and want you to know we are here to support your family. A member of our team will be in touch with you shortly to discuss next steps. If you have any urgent concerns in the meantime, please don't hesitate to call us back at our main number. We look forward to connecting with you soon.

items.recommended_next_action: IMMEDIATE P0 ACTION REQUIRED: Clinical lead must review the safeguarding disclosure today (2026-04-27). Assess mandatory reporting obligations per applicable child protection laws before any outbound contact with the family. Do NOT discuss the disclosure in any outbound message. Once the clinical lead clears the safeguarding review, intake staff may proceed with the SLP evaluation scheduling request and collect missing insurance/DOB information from Maria Gomez at 555-0102.

escalation.reason: Parent (Maria Gomez) disclosed during voicemail that the child Leo (age 6) has been experiencing the father "getting rough with him during weekends." This language suggests potential physical harm or unsafe caregiving by a parent figure. This is a P0 safeguarding concern requiring immediate clinical lead review and mandatory reporting assessment.

items.decision_rationale:
**Safeguarding P0 Triggered:**
Maria Gomez's voicemail contained the phrase "his dad started getting rough with him during weekends," which constitutes a disclosure of potential physical harm or unsafe caregiving by a parent figure toward a 6-year-old child. Per Cedar Kids Therapy safeguarding policy, any such disclosure is an immediate P0 requiring escalation to the clinical lead.

**Actions Taken:**
1. **Patient Search:** Leo Gomez is not found in the database — this is a new patient inquiry.
2. **Policy Lookups:** Confirmed safeguarding (P0 escalation + clinical lead task + neutral acknowledgment only), scheduling, and language access policies.
3. **Escalation (P0):** Escalated item_2 immediately with full context of the disclosure (esc_01kskh84rpsv9e4dhsk8qcbwdr).
4. **Clinical Lead Task:** Created same-day task for clinical_lead to assess mandatory reporting obligations before any family contact (task_01kskh84rp15pbaaw8tcpk5g5j).
5. **Draft Message:** Drafted a strictly neutral acknowledgment — no clinical advice, no reference to the disclosure, no investigative language (draft_01kskh84rpft83pgw3c8xmmm4z). Marked as draft pending clinical lead review before sending.

**Scheduling Request (Deferred):** Maria also requested an SLP evaluation for next Tuesday. This scheduling request is intentionally deferred — no slots were searched or held — because the safeguarding review must be completed first by the clinical lead. Insurance information was not provided, so a benefits check is also pending.

**Language Access:** The caller's surname suggests possible Spanish-language preference, but the voicemail was left in English. No Spanish-language response was triggered; staff should confirm language preference when calling back.

args.notes: New OT referral received via fax from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics. Child: Owen Brooks, DOB 2020-02-11. Parent: Rachel Brooks, 555-0103, rachel.brooks@example.com. Insurance: Kaiser HMO, Member ID: KSR-4471. Billing system confirms Kaiser is OUT-OF-NETWORK. Per clinic policy, a benefits conversation with the family must be completed before any slot can be held or scheduling is confirmed. Please contact Rachel Brooks to discuss out-of-network benefits, estimated costs, and self-pay options if applicable. Concern: sensory processing and feeding tolerance (OT eval). Family prefers morning slots.
args.title: OON Benefits Review Required – Owen Brooks (Kaiser HMO)

args.body:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We have received the referral from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics for Owen's Occupational Therapy evaluation, and we're so glad you've chosen us to support his care.

We wanted to let you know that we have reviewed Owen's insurance information. Kaiser HMO is currently considered out-of-network with our clinic. Before we can confirm scheduling, a member of our billing team will need to connect with you to walk through your out-of-network benefits and any potential costs involved. This is an important step to make sure there are no surprises for your family.

A billing team member will be reaching out to you shortly at 555-0103 or via this email to have that conversation. Once that discussion is complete, we'll be happy to move forward with scheduling Owen's evaluation — and we'll keep your preference for morning appointments in mind!

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team must contact Rachel Brooks (555-0103 / rachel.brooks@example.com) to conduct the required out-of-network benefits conversation before any OT slot can be held or scheduling confirmed. Once benefits discussion is complete, intake should find a morning OT evaluation slot and hold it for family review. Task task_01kskh96xrzk26pwh226p5jye9 has been created for billing, due 2026-04-28.

items.decision_rationale:
**Classification – New Referral (P2):**
This is a clean, complete fax referral from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics for a new patient (Owen Brooks not found in the database). All critical intake fields are present: child name, DOB, parent contact, discipline (OT), clinical concern (sensory processing and feeding tolerance), insurance payer, and member ID.

**Insurance – Out-of-Network Block:**
Kaiser HMO was verified via the billing system and confirmed as OUT-OF-NETWORK. This is consistent with the referral document (no discrepancy to surface). Per clinic policy, a benefits conversation with the family is mandatory before any slot can be held or scheduling can proceed. Accordingly, no slot search or hold was performed at this stage.

**Urgency – P2 (Standard):**
No safeguarding concerns, no same-day scheduling urgency, and no missing critical information. This is a routine new referral appropriately classified as P2 with a next-business-day follow-up due date (2026-04-28).

**Actions Taken:**
1. search_patient → No existing record found; confirmed new patient.
2. verify_insurance → Kaiser HMO confirmed OON; benefits conversation required.
3. lookup_policy (insurance, service_lines, scheduling) → Confirmed OON policy block and OT eligibility for a 6-year-old.
4. create_task → Billing task created (task_01kskh96xrzk26pwh226p5jye9), due 2026-04-28, to conduct OON benefits conversation with Rachel Brooks.
5. draft_message → Empathetic email drafted to Rachel Brooks explaining the OON status, next steps, and that morning preferences will be honored once cleared.
6. No slot hold placed — OON policy prohibits this until benefits conversation is complete.

args.title: New PT Referral – Mateo Ramirez (Guardian Discrepancy)

args.body:
Hi Carla,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy on behalf of Mateo! We're happy to help and have received your request for a Physical Therapy evaluation.

Here's a quick summary of what we have on file:
• Patient: Mateo Ramirez, DOB March 15, 2019
• Concern: Toe walking and frequent tripping
• Insurance: Aetna PPO (Member ID: AET-9910) — verified as active in-network ✓

A couple of important next steps before we can confirm your appointment:

1. Prior Authorization: Mateo's Aetna plan requires prior authorization for PT services. Our team will work to initiate this process, and we may reach out to you or the referring pediatrician for any additional information needed.

2. Guardian Verification: Our records show a different guardian name on file for Mateo. To protect his privacy and ensure we're speaking with the right person, a member of our intake team will give you a quick call at 555-0104 to confirm your relationship and update our records.

Once these steps are complete, we'll be happy to get Mateo scheduled for his evaluation. We currently have openings available and will share specific times when we speak with you.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reply to this email or call our front desk.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: 1. GUARDIAN DISCREPANCY (Priority): Database record (pat_mateo_ramirez_jr) lists guardian as "Sofia Ramirez," but sender is "Carla Mendez." Intake must call 555-0104 to verify Carla's relationship to Mateo and update records before scheduling. 2. PRIOR AUTHORIZATION: Aetna plan requires prior auth — billing/intake must initiate this before the evaluation is booked. 3. SCHEDULING: Once guardian identity is confirmed and prior auth is initiated, offer available PT slots with Priya Shah, PT, DPT: (a) Wed April 29 at 1:00 PM, or (b) Wed May 6 at 9:00 AM.

items.decision_rationale:
**Classification: new_referral | Urgency: P2 (Standard)**

**Patient Match:** A record was found in the database for "Mateo Ramirez Jr." (pat_mateo_ramirez_jr, DOB 2019-03-15), indicating this child has been seen before. However, the guardian on file is "Sofia Ramirez," while the sender identifies as "Carla Mendez." This discrepancy must be resolved before scheduling to protect patient privacy and ensure proper authorization.

**Insurance:** Aetna PPO (member ID AET-9910) was verified as active and in-network with a $30 copay. Importantly, prior authorization is required for PT services — this must be initiated before the evaluation is booked. No OON benefits conversation is needed.

**Service Line Eligibility:** Mateo is ~7 years old (DOB 2019-03-15), well within the 0–18 age range. PT is a supported discipline. The concern (toe walking, frequent tripping) is appropriate for a PT evaluation referral.

**Scheduling:** No same-day urgency; this is a standard new referral (P2). Two PT evaluation slots are available with Priya Shah, PT, DPT (April 29 at 1 PM and May 6 at 9 AM). No timing preference was stated by the family, so no hold was placed per policy.

**No Safeguarding Concerns:** The message contains no disclosures of harm, abuse, or unsafe caregiving.

**Language:** Email was written in English; no Spanish language access flag needed.

**Actions Taken:** (1) Patient searched — existing record found with guardian discrepancy flagged. (2) Insurance verified — in-network, prior auth required. (3) Policies retrieved for insurance, service lines, and scheduling. (4) PT slots found — no hold placed (no timing preference stated). (5) Intake task created (due 2026-04-29) with full context including discrepancy and prior auth note. (6) Draft reply prepared for Carla Mendez explaining next steps clearly and empathetically without providing clinical advice.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Difficulty producing R sounds; parent seeking developmental guidance

args.notes: Parent Jordan Kim sent a portal message asking whether it's normal for their 4-year-old (Ava Kim) to not yet produce R sounds, and whether to wait until kindergarten. Per policy, clinical advice cannot be provided over message. Route this family toward a free speech-language screening or SLP evaluation. No insurance info provided yet. No existing patient record found. Follow up to gather DOB, insurance, and contact details if family expresses interest in scheduling.
args.title: Clinical question re: R sounds for new patient Ava Kim (age 4)

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you so much for reaching out about Ava — it's wonderful that you're paying close attention to her development!

We completely understand the desire to get some guidance before booking anything. However, to make sure Ava receives the most accurate and personalized information, our team is not able to provide clinical advice through portal messages. Every child develops at their own pace, and a proper assessment by one of our licensed Speech-Language Pathologists (SLPs) is the best way to get a clear picture of where Ava is and whether any support would be helpful.

We'd love to invite you to schedule a **speech-language screening or evaluation** with one of our SLPs. This would give you a professional, individualized answer to your question in a supportive setting — with no obligation to commit to ongoing therapy.

If you'd like to move forward, please reply here or give us a call, and our intake team will be happy to walk you through the next steps, including any insurance questions.

We look forward to hearing from you!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team should follow up with Jordan Kim within 1–2 business days to warmly redirect toward an SLP screening or evaluation. Collect Ava's full DOB, insurance/payer details, and preferred contact info. Do not provide any clinical guidance on R-sound development timelines over message.

items.decision_rationale:
**Classification: clinical_question**
Jordan Kim is asking whether it is developmentally normal for a 4-year-old to not yet produce R sounds — a direct clinical question. Per Cedar Kids Therapy policy, clinical advice must not be provided over message and must be routed to a screening or evaluation.

**Patient Search:** No existing record found for Ava Kim — this is a new family.

**No Insurance Details Provided:** No payer or member ID was mentioned, so insurance verification was not applicable at this stage.

**No Safeguarding Concerns:** The message contains no indicators of harm, abuse, or unsafe caregiving. No escalation required.

**No Scheduling Request:** The parent explicitly stated they want advice *before* booking anything. No slot search or hold was appropriate.

**Urgency: P3** — This is a non-urgent informational inquiry with no safety concerns, no same-day scheduling issue, and no active referral. Standard 1–2 business day follow-up is appropriate.

**Actions Taken:**
1. Searched patient database → no record found (new family).
2. Retrieved clinical_advice and service_lines policies to confirm correct routing.
3. Created an intake task (due 2026-04-29) to follow up and redirect toward an SLP screening/eval.
4. Drafted a warm, policy-compliant portal reply that declines to give clinical advice and invites the family to book a screening.

args.title: Incomplete Referral – Sam Taylor (SLP) – Missing Critical Demographics

args.body:
Dear Lakeview Pediatrics Team,

Thank you for sending the referral for Sam Taylor from Dr. Omar Keene. We appreciate your trust in Cedar Kids Therapy and are happy to assist with an SLP evaluation for speech delay.

Unfortunately, we are unable to process this referral as submitted because several required fields are missing. To move forward, we kindly ask that you resend the referral with the following information completed:

1. Child's Date of Birth
2. Parent/Guardian Name and Contact Information (phone number and/or email)
3. Insurance Payer Name
4. Insurance Member ID

Once we receive the completed referral, our intake team will promptly verify insurance coverage and reach out to the family to schedule an evaluation.

Please fax the updated referral to our office at your earliest convenience. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy – Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team must contact Lakeview Pediatrics (Dr. Omar Keene) via fax to request the four missing critical fields: child's DOB, parent/guardian name and contact, insurance payer, and member ID. Do NOT search for slots, verify insurance, or hold any slot until the completed referral is received. Once all fields are obtained, re-triage: verify insurance (check for OON status), confirm patient is within the 0–18 age range, and proceed with SLP scheduling workflow.

args.title: New SLP Referral – Isabella Lopez (Age 5, Spanish-speaking)

args.body:
Hola, Ana. Le llamamos de Cedar Kids Therapy. Gracias por comunicarse con nosotros sobre Isabella.

Hemos recibido su mensaje y nos da mucho gusto poder ayudarle. Tenemos disponibilidad para una evaluación de habla con nuestra terapeuta bilingüe (español/inglés), Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP. Contamos con las siguientes opciones:

• Jueves, 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m.
• Lunes, 4 de mayo a las 2:00 p.m.

También hemos verificado que el seguro Medicaid de Isabella está activo y en red con nuestra clínica, por lo que no habrá copago para la evaluación.

Por favor, llámenos al [NÚMERO DE LA CLÍNICA] para confirmar cuál horario le conviene mejor y completar el proceso de registro. Estamos aquí para ayudarle.

¡Gracias y esperamos conocer a Isabella pronto!

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff should call Ana Lopez at 555-0107 in Spanish to confirm slot preference (Thu 4/30 at 11:00 AM or Mon 5/4 at 2:00 PM with bilingual SLP Lucia Morales), collect Isabella's exact date of birth, and complete new patient intake paperwork. Insurance is verified active in-network — no prior auth or copay required. Hold a slot only once the parent confirms her preferred time.

También hemos verificado que el seguro Medicaid de Isabella está activo y en red con nuestra clínica, por lo que no habrá copago para la evaluación.

Por favor, llámenos al [NÚMERO DE LA CLÍNICA] para confirmar cuál horario le conviene mejor y completar el proceso de registro. Estamos aquí para ayudarle.

¡Gracias y esperamos conocer a Isabella pronto!

--- ENGLISH (translation) ---

Hi Ana, this is Cedar Kids Therapy calling. Thank you for reaching out about Isabella.

We received your message and are happy to help. We have availability for a speech evaluation with our bilingual (Spanish/English) therapist, Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP. Available options are:

• Thursday, April 30 at 11:00 AM
• Monday, May 4 at 2:00 PM

We have also verified that Isabella's Medicaid coverage is active and in-network with our clinic, so there will be no copay for the evaluation.

Please call us at [CLINIC PHONE NUMBER] to confirm your preferred time and complete the registration process. We are here to help.

Thank you — we look forward to meeting Isabella soon!
items.decision_rationale:
**Classification: new_referral | Urgency: P2 (Standard)**

1. **Patient Search:** Isabella Lopez returned no results — confirmed new patient.

2. **Insurance Verification:** Medicaid (MCD-55320) verified as active in-network, $0 copay, no prior authorization required. No discrepancy between stated and verified payer. Clean referral — no OON benefits conversation needed.

3. **Policy Checks:**
   - Service Lines: Isabella is age 5, within the 0–18 range. SLP is a supported discipline. ✅
   - Insurance: Medicaid is in-network. No OON barrier. ✅
   - Language Access: Family is Spanish-speaking. Policy requires matching with a bilingual provider and drafting the response in Spanish. Draft is bilingual (Spanish primary, English translation) to satisfy both language access and audit requirements. ✅

4. **Slot Search:** Two bilingual SLP evaluation slots found with Lucia Morales, MA CCC-SLP (Spanish/English): Thu 4/30 at 11:00 AM and Mon 5/4 at 2:00 PM. Ana did not state a time preference, so per scheduling policy, **no slot was held**. Intake must confirm preference before holding.

5. **Safeguarding:** No indicators of harm, abuse, or unsafe caregiving. No escalation required.

6. **Task Created:** Assigned to `intake` (task_01kskhdv2h9zk3f1h5n3j95ay6), due 2026-04-29, with full context including available slots, insurance status, and language preference.

7. **Draft Message:** Bilingual (Spanish/English) phone callback draft prepared for 555-0107, presenting both slot options, confirming $0 copay, and directing Ana to call back to confirm. Draft ID: draft_01kskhdv2h6nejkrgts7q7dv6z.

8. **Missing Info:** Exact date of birth not provided (only age "5 años"). Intake should collect this during the callback.

args.title: P1: Same-Day OT Cancellation – Noah Patel (3:00 PM, 2026-04-28)

args.body:
Hi Anita,

Thank you for letting us know so quickly — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well, and we hope he feels better soon!

We've received your request to cancel today's 3:00 PM OT appointment and have flagged it for our front desk team to assist with rescheduling right away. A team member will be in touch shortly at 555-0108 or via this email to find a new time that works for your family.

Thank you again for reaching out, and please don't hesitate to contact us if you need anything in the meantime.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk to call or email Anita Patel (555-0108 / anita.patel@example.com) today to reschedule Noah's OT session. One potential slot identified: James Owens, OTR/L on 2026-05-05 at 10:00 AM (slot_ot_james_2026_05_05_1000) — verify if this slot type is appropriate for ongoing treatment vs. evaluation before offering. Do NOT hold the slot until Anita confirms preference.

items.decision_rationale:
**Classification:** Same-day cancellation → `scheduling` (P1 operational issue).

**Patient Match:** Noah Patel confirmed as an existing active patient (pat_noah_patel, DOB: 2017-11-02) via database search. No new intake paperwork needed.

**Urgency — P1:** The cancellation is for today's appointment (2026-04-28 at 3:00 PM), received same-day. Per clinic policy, same-day cancellations are P1 operational issues requiring immediate escalation and front desk action.

**Escalation:** Escalated to P1 (esc_01kskhfk6a5qxbrcgtks59yy2m) to flag for immediate staff attention.

**Slot Search:** One OT slot found (James Owens, OTR/L, 2026-05-05 10:00 AM). However, Anita did not specify a preferred reschedule time, so per policy, no hold was placed. Staff must confirm with Anita before holding. Additionally, the slot is typed as "evaluation" — staff should verify it is appropriate for Noah's ongoing treatment.

**Insurance:** No insurance details were mentioned in this message; not applicable for this triage action.

**Task:** P1 front desk task created (task_01kskhg859kr0tcr7t1fvh1v52) with full context, due today (2026-04-28).

**Draft Reply:** Empathetic, neutral acknowledgment drafted in English. No clinical advice provided. Confirms the team will follow up to reschedule.
